privacy.about.title: About This Application
privacy.about.description: This application is designed to systematically organize song video information from KMNZ and other KMN members, providing a sleek interface for browsing.
privacy.nocollection.title: Data Collection
privacy.nocollection.description: This application does not collect any personal information from end users. There is no account registration or login functionality, and no user activity data is sent to our servers.
privacy.youtube.title: YouTube Video Playback
privacy.youtube.description: This application uses the YouTube IFrame Player API to play music videos. When videos are played through an embedded player, advertisements may not be displayed in the same way as when viewing directly on YouTube.com.
privacy.youtube.disclaimer: This application does not block or remove advertisements. The absence of ads is a characteristic of YouTube's embedded player behavior, not a feature of this application. YouTube may change this behavior at any time.
privacy.youtube.tracking: The YouTube embedded player may attempt to communicate with YouTube/Google's internal advertising services (such as doubleclick.net). This is standard behavior of the YouTube player and is not initiated or controlled by this application.
privacy.youtube.tos: By using this application, you also agree to the following:
privacy.cookies.title: Local Storage
privacy.cookies.description: This application uses browser local storage to save your language and display preferences. This data is stored only in your browser and is never sent to our servers. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.
privacy.thirdparty.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdparty.description: This application uses the YouTube IFrame Player API for video playback. YouTube's Terms of Service and Google's Privacy Policy apply when playing videos.
privacy.changes.title: Changes to This Policy
privacy.changes.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page. We encourage you to review this page periodically for the latest information.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
